metadata.instruction: Open video Task ID 75.mp4 in Documents > Task 75 folder on Media Player. Play the video in 1.5x speed.
metadata.context: I'm watching a video on Media Player, but I'm on a time crunch so I want to speed through it.

l3.rationale: Alt+D begins focusing the Explorer address bar.

l4.rationale: In File Explorer, the user focuses the address bar, types the Documents\Task 75 path, and submits it to open that folder location.

l5.rationale: This span covers the initial search/start interaction and app opening, ending when Windows Media Player is launched.

l3.rationale: Tab moves focus to the Large Icons option.

l4.rationale: The user cycles through Explorer tabs, view controls, and the folder pane to move around the Task 75 window and reach the desired item.

l5.rationale: These L4 methods continue the file-opening flow through dialogs, selection controls, and search typing to reach and open Task 75.mp4.

l3.rationale: Ctrl+L focuses the address bar.

l5.rationale: These L4 methods continue the file-opening flow through dialogs, selection controls, and search typing to reach and open Task 75.mp4.

l3.rationale: Alt+S reaches the seek slider in Media Player.

l4.rationale: In Media Player, the user moves focus among playback controls, the seek slider, and mini-player options while looking for the playback-speed controls.

l5.rationale: This span is focused on playback controls, including slider/button navigation and confirmation, consistent with changing speed to 1.5x.
